subject: FW: a personal note to JE...
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: BEHNBOM@aol.com [mailto:BEHNBOM@aol.com] 
Sent: Sunday, September 23, 2007 5:47 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: a personal note to JE...


Dear Jeffrey,
 
I am so upset reading all the the one-sided stuff in the newspaper and I
worry about you?! Is it really this bad?...and why dont they go after
that woman down there instead??!! anyway, me all my BBBs certainly can
attest to your good character and all the good you do!! I can see this
being very political times and obviously this is politically motivated
but you cannot help thinking if the police in Florida shouldn't be more
busy catching bad drug smugglers killing thousands of young kids here
every year...?? 
 
Anyway my dear, so sorry you have to go through all this shit, stay
strong, breathe deep, you are a very good and special person who has
made a big difference in so many people's lives!
 
Love,
 
Barbro

body_html:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

From: BEHNBOM@aol.com [mailto:BEHNBOM@aol.com]
Sent: Sunday, September 23, 2007 5:47 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: a personal note to JE...

Dear Jeffrey,
 
I am so upset reading all the the one-sided stuff in the newspaper and I worry about you?! Is it really this bad?...and why dont they go after that woman down there instead??!! anyway, me all my BBBs certainly can attest to your good character and all the good you do!! I can see this being very political times and obviously this is politically motivated but you cannot help thinking if the police in Florida shouldn't be more busy catching bad drug smugglers killing thousands of young kids here every year...??
 
Anyway my dear, so sorry you have to go through all this shit, stay strong, breathe deep, you are a very good and special person who has made a big difference in so many people's lives!
 
Love,
 
Barbro
